demographics.occupation: wears heavy occlusive boots for long periods (physically active/outdoor-type work)

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The bottoms of my feet are covered in hundreds of tiny, hard blisters. They itch and burn so intensely I can't put any pressure on them at all.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The blisters came up suddenly over the last two days and the burning pain is so bad I can barely walk — I'm scared it's a bad allergic reaction or a chemical burn and I want it sorted before the morning.

symptom_narrative.duration: two days and the blistering has spread across both soles
symptom_narrative.character: hundreds of tiny, deep, tense blisters filled with clear fluid on the arches and soles, with intense itching and burning; the skin between the little toes is soggy, peeling and cracked, and there is a bit of a smell
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst burning I've had — I can't stand or put any weight on my feet, I've been crawling or holding onto furniture
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both soles, mainly the arches and insteps, plus between the outer toes
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on fast over a couple of days and has been constant since
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: keeping my feet up and off the ground eases the pain a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing on them or putting on shoes is agony
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no fever, no feeling unwell in myself, no red streaks going up my legs — it's just my feet
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had itchy flaky skin and cracking between my toes on and off for a while, but never blisters like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can't walk properly, avoiding standing on the soles, using furniture to get around

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: on-and-off itchy, flaky, cracking skin between the toes for a long time

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: had been wearing closed-in, unventilated boots and thick wool socks for several days during a hot, sweaty spell; feet have been sweating a lot

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: both soles, especially the arches and insteps, are covered in dozens to hundreds of small tense blisters filled with clear fluid on red skin
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: described from a video/photo view held up by the patient, not a clinician skin examination; whether the blister fluid is clear or pus-filled cannot be reliably judged remotely

objective_data_offered.value: the skin in the outer web spaces between the toes looks soggy, white, peeling and cracked, with fine flaking and thickened skin along the sides of the feet
the toenails look mildly thickened and a bit yellow at the ends
a mild bad smell from the feet; no thick yellow pus, no honey-coloured crusting, and no spreading redness up the foot or ankle that the patient can see
sitting with both feet elevated, uncomfortable and anxious about the blisters, but otherwise well in himself and speaking in full sentences
